content: The fragmented, incomplete search-derived knowledge that forms the partial foundation of both Topic A (neural architecture memory episodic planning agent) and Topic B (agent) can be reframed as a spontaneous episodic memory store for a curiosity-driven active learning agent itself. The open-ended incomplete findings act as unprocessed environmental stimuli that trigger the agent’s intrinsic curiosity to fill in knowledge gaps, rather than being static raw material for designing the agent.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
